title: BSEB Class 10th Matric Compartment Result 2026
short_information: Bihar School Examination Board (BSEB) Bihar Board release the results for the Class 10th Matriculation Annual Board Exam 2026. The answer key has already been released for enrolled candidates. Candidates can check it and verify their answers. Candidates with objections to any answers can submit them within the deadline and time specified by the board. After the objection process is complete, the BSEB will declare the final result. Candidates will be able to check their results/marks by entering their roll code and roll number on the official website. The official result 29 March 2026. rows: Bihar Board Class 10th Matric Exam Result, Scrutiny and Compartment Result 2026

Bihar School Examination Board (BSEB) Bihar Board release the results for the Class 10th Matriculation Annual Board Exam 2026. The answer key has already been released for enrolled candidates. Candidates can check it and verify their answers. Candidates with objections to any answers can submit them within the deadline and time specified by the board. After the objection process is complete, the BSEB will declare the final result. Candidates will be able to check their results/marks by entering their roll code and roll number on the official website. The official result 29 March 2026.
